characters.name: Argon the Ageless
characters.description: Argon the Agelessis a famed heroic warrior from eastern Fasellan, a kingdom that is never properly shown in the series. He has lived for several hundred years, at least, but never shows any sign of aging. He was in his youth the previous owner ofLula, the sword currently wielded by PrinceDaveofUdrogoth. He is voiced by Jeff Bennett. Argon the Ageless with Lula Argon is a human warrior who resembles a teenager who wears a green outfit with short brown pants and long blonde hair. He is known for being heroic, though is often narcissistic. Lula was very fond of him and wants him to return to her inLula's First Barbarian, his first and only appearance.

characters.name: Candy
characters.description: Candyis the princess ofUdrogothand is the deuteragonist. She is the oldest child of the three siblings fromDave the Barbarian. She is voiced by Canadian voice over artistErica Luttrell. Candy is the oldest child of the King and Queen of Udrogoth. When the parents leave the kingdom to fight evil, Candy is charged with ruling the kingdom as regent, while her brother Dave is to protect it. Candy is a valley girl-accented rebellious teen, who prefers buying to ruling the kingdom. She is considered to be the most beautiful girl in the kingdom, but can be selfish and stubborn. While her brother Dave is considered the strongest barbarian, Candy has martial arts skills, and has been shown to be excellent at combating monsters attacking shops.

characters.name: Dave
characters.description: 80s Bandit Heeler(younger brother) Daveis the main character in the Disney cartoonDave the Barbarian. In the only aired season, he is voiced byDanny Cooksey. Dave the Barbarian is the huge (about 6'11 and 3 quarters), muscular barbarian war-prince ofUdrogothwho would rather watch the Simpsons. He is afraid of a lot of things, and screams a lot and he sometimes gets pranked by Irmaplotz (who drew lines on Dave’s face and on his eyelids when Dave was asleep 💤) and when he got pranked while he was asleep 💤 Dave cries and when Dave cries mascara runs from his eyes. At least once in an episode, he will be frightened somehow, and shriek his high-pitched, effeminate scream and cry 😭 sometimes a lot. Dave once admitted that he only became a barbarian in the 80s when he was 9 years old (just like Bandit Heeler when he was 10 years old in Fairytale from Bluey).

characters.name: Dinky and Cheezette
characters.description: DinkyandCheezetteare side characters in Dave the Barbarian. Dinky is voiced byErica Luttrelland Cheezette is voiced byTress MacNeille. They arePrincess Candy's best friends who, like her, are teenage girls obsessed with fashion, clothes, and social lives. They are friendly, but sometimes unsupportive of Candy's actions. Dinky is short and has dark skin, black hair and red and yellow clothing, while Cheezette is taller and has light skin, purple hair, and a sea green dress. Little is known about them besides their relationships with Candy.

characters.name: Dinky and Cheezette

characters.name: Faffy
characters.description: Faffy Faffyis the pet dragon ofDave the Barbarian. He is voiced byFrank Welker. Unlike most dragons who spew fire, Faffy breathes lightning, is domesticated, and has no tail. He does possess a wild streak that can be revealed when around other dragons, particularly evil ones with rebel attitudes. He is blazed by a much bigger dragon in the show'stheme song. He loves to eat and spends a lot of time with his friends. His shape resembles that of a pig. He has small orange wings and olive-colored skin with purple spots.

characters.name: Faffy
characters.description: Faffy Faffyis the pet dragon ofDave the Barbarian. He is voiced byFrank Welker. Unlike most dragons who spew fire, Faffy breathes lightning, is domesticated, and has no tail. He does possess a wild streak that can be revealed when around other dragons, particularly evil ones with rebel attitudes. He is blazed by a much bigger dragon in the show'stheme song. He loves to eat and spends a lot of time with his friends. His shape resembles that of a pig. He has small orange wings and olive-colored skin with purple spots.

characters.name: Fang
characters.description: Fangis the little sister of title characterDaveandPrincess Candyand is the tritagonist. She is voiced by Tress MacNeille. The youngest of the three siblings (and probably the most Barbaric out of all the family), Fang (nicknamed by bugs as "The Great Destructor") is a very rambunctious and uncivilized girl who liked to smash things. She resembles a cross between both Pebbles and Bamm-Bamm of Hanna-Barbera'sThe Flintstonesand is the victim of a running gag where she is often mistaken for a monkey, hence her catchphrase, "Not a monkey!" (However, during the fight against Chuckles and the Vermites, just after receiving the insult, she jumps on a bunch of bananas shouting as a monkey). There was also this one episode where she genuinely thought she was a monkey when she was taken in by a society of monkeys who look just like her. She is too small to fight most of the time and resents Dave (who is very strong) because of his cowardice. Like her Uncle Oswidge, she secretly likes to play with dolls, but doesn't like people to know. In one episode where the castle is being destroyed, she cries "All my dollies are in there!" then quickly tries to cover up what she just said. Fang wields a spear in combat.

characters.name: Glimia
characters.description: Queen Glimia, along with her husband the King, is half of the proper rulers ofUdrogoth. However they are away fighting "all evil around the world". She is the mother ofDave,CandyandFang, the sister ofOswidge, the daughter-in-law ofMabelandStan, and she is the wife of KingThroktar. She wears a purple and yellow dress and has dark rose-colored hair. The King and Queen are able to communicate with their children viaOswidge's crystal ball.

characters.name: Invisigoths
characters.description: TheInvisigothsare a group of invisible evil invaders, possibly magical, who make their only appearance inThe Lost Race of Reeber. In this episode, Dave and his sisters must help the Reeber people get their land back from them. The Invisigoths partially revealed after they slam into a wall

characters.name: Jett
characters.description: Jett is male cool dragon.

characters.name: Knuckles the Silly Piggy
characters.description: Knuckles the Silly Piggyis the nephew ofChuckles. He appears inThe Princess and the Peabrains. He's voiced by Brian Posehn. Knuckles is a large, dimwitted anthropomorphic pig. He wears overalls and has large, misshapen teeth and a small tuft of blonde hair. Unlike Chuckles, he is kind and only wants to be a Harvest Hog. Knuckles is a large, dimwitted anthropomorphic pig. He wears overalls and has large, misshapen teeth and a small tuft of blonde hair. Unlike Chuckles, he is kind and only wants to be a Harvest Hog.

characters.name: Lula
characters.description: LulaisDave's enchanted sword. She is very wise and often annoyed by Dave's stupidity. She is voiced by the lateEstelle Harris.  Lula is a shrill, impatient and sarcastic enchanted sword. Her main ability is shooting a lightning discharge from the tip of her blade. She was once the sword of Argon the Ageless, but was used by Argon as the nose of a snowman, and left there for centuries. She is over 16,000 years old and has been know at time to fly approximately 2-3 feet in the air. Lula is a shrill, impatient and sarcastic enchanted sword. Her main ability is shooting a lightning discharge from the tip of her blade. She is over 16,000 years old and has been know at time to fly approximately 2-3 feet in the air.

characters.name: Malsquando
characters.description: Malsquando Malsquandois a secondary antagonist andOswidge's archrival. He is an evil sorcerer who is obsessed with taking over the world and making money, and owns a shop that can cure "hiccats". He is a member of the Evil Sorcerer's Union. He is voiced byRob Paulsen. Malsquando is tall, thin and has a large nose. He has a long white beard and long white hair and eyebrows. He wears a dark purple robe and hat.

characters.name: Malsquando
characters.description: Malsquando Malsquandois a secondary antagonist andOswidge's archrival. He is an evil sorcerer who is obsessed with taking over the world and making money, and owns a shop that can cure "hiccats". He is a member of the Evil Sorcerer's Union. He is voiced byRob Paulsen. Malsquando is tall, thin and has a large nose. He has a long white beard and long white hair and eyebrows. He wears a dark purple robe and hat.

characters.name: Mrs. Gert Bogmelon
characters.description: Mrs. Gert Bogmelonis a witch-like shopkeeper who loves money and loves to rip off her customers. She can be cowed by Fang and other aggressive people but takes advantage of meek people like Dave. She sells evil weasels, mystical swords, and other plot-related paraphernalia, such as used T-shirts for sporting events. Her catchphrases are "Are you looking for something, darling?" and "We got that!". She is voiced by Lisa Kaplan. Mrs. Gert Bogmelon

characters.name: Mrs. Gert Bogmelon
characters.description: Mrs. Gert Bogmelonis a witch-like shopkeeper who loves money and loves to rip off her customers. Her catchphrases are "Are you looking for something, darling?" and "We got that!". She is voiced by Lisa Kaplan. Mrs. Gert Bogmelon

characters.name: Ned Frischman
characters.description: Ned Frischmanis a secondary villain ofDave the Barbarian. He is voiced byRichard Horvitz. Ned Frischman first appears inNed Frischman: Man of Tomorrow. Ned is a lowly employee at a Zipper Factory in 1994. Barely anyone likes him, and he dreams of becoming employee of the month. By a wild turn of events, one of his zippers was transformed into a Time Zipper. Now given the ability to travel through time, Ned goes into the past to the Kingdom ofUdrogoth. He gives Udrogoth's citizens a handheld video game system calledGameGuy, and forces them to do his bidding to earn batteries. He forced them to build monuments like a Ned Sphinx, a Ned Pyramid, and a Ned Mini-Golf Course. However,Faffy,Lula, andTwinkle the Marvel Horse(who do not have thumbs, and cannot play the GameGuy) attempt to stop him. Unfortunately, Ned captured them and decided to dispose of them in the Great Pyramid of Ned. However, Dave happened to come along with sandwiches for Ned, and Lula convinced him to rescue them from Ned (by agreeing to give him the secret to get past level 6 of "Bash the Behemoth."). But Ned used his Time Zipper to bring a dinosaur to attack Udrogoth. Unfortunately, it only destroyed Ned's monuments (but not before playing a round on Ned's mini-golf course). Ned was sent back to 1994, where he still had hopes of becoming employee of the month, but unfortunately for him, the title was given to Rexy, the dinosaur he used to attack Udrogoth. Later on, he reappears inI Love Neddy, where he attempts to make friends by telling jokes. Unfortunately, his jokes were very old. He then had the idea that "old jokes are funny if you've never heard them before," and heads back to Udrogoth to tell his old-timey jokes with the Barbarians. At first, they are all sold by his "humor." He performed such jokes at night clubs, arenas, and even sitcoms, because according to him, people sit while he does comedy (Though in actuality, "sitcom" is short forsituationcomedy). It was then that the Royal Family decided to take initiative. Dave suggests making a show that is funnier than Ned's, but everyone else is too lazy, so they just bring an audience in and hope something interesting happens (thus inventing reality television). Their showReal Live Barbariansproves to be a hit, and Ned is abandoned. He attempts to defeat the royal family with his corny jokes, but Dave tickles him back into the future with some convenient feathers. Back in the future, Ned is fuming that he can't make people laugh, but then falls and gets his head stuck in a water cooler, which gets lots of laughs from his fellow workers, just not in the way he hoped.

characters.name: Oswidge
characters.description: UncleOswidgeis the uncle of main characterDaveand his sisters,FangandCandyand is the tetartagonist. He is a rather clumsy And a nice sorcerer who usually has havoc with his spells rather than being ungrateful. It was revealed in the episode "Sorcerer Material" (when the cat had scratched Dave really hard; seeList of Episodesthat has Dave crying 😭 on it) that he never really went to sorcerer school, he just worked in the cafeteria. Uncle Oswidge loves to help Fang to try to comfort Dave. Like his niece Fang, he secretly likes to play with dolls. His favorite foods are ham and "Nut Logs" and cannot resist about the rain 🌧️ dripping on the window 🪟. His knowledge of magic and most other things like calming Dave down with Fang’s help while Princess Candy connects Bluetooth to her mirror 🪞 on her bedroom wall.

characters.name: Princess Irmaplotz
characters.description: Princess Irmaplotzis the evil sorceress princess ofHyrogoth. She is either trying to destroy Dave, or at the very least make his life difficult. Her motherZontharais the ruler of Hyrogoth, and keeps trying to impress upon her daughter to be more evil since her husband, Irmapoltz' father, is good, Zonthara feels her to only behalfevil. At an early point in her career, the Princess fell in love with Dave, but was eventually dumped as he decided they were too different. So like all rejected girlfriends, she spends a large part of her time and efforts seeking revenge.

characters.name: Queen Zonthara
characters.description: Queen Zontharais an antagonist from theDisney Channelanimated series,Dave the Barbarian.  She is voiced by the lateJoan Rivers. Zonthara is the ruler of Hyrogoth, She keeps on trying to teach Irmaplotz to be more evil. Her husband  is good, making her half-evil. Her father is good. Even though she’s evil Queen Zonthara really does love Irmaplotz very much. She even taught her that if Dave really loved her, he’d love her for who she is.

characters.name: Quosmir
characters.description: Quosmiris the ancient god of freshly laundered trousers, overused punctuation and possibly other random and ridiculous things. He appears as a villain inDave the Barbarian. He is voiced byMichael McShaneand first appears inShrink Rap. He has "mommy issues" and carries a security blanket known as his "ni-ni lankie". He often experiences short-term memory loss and possible ADHD. He tries to be taken seriously, but often lets his personal issues get in the way. He resembles a muscular green humanoid with a beard and a snakelike tail. His mother also appears inShrink Rap.

characters.name: Quosmir
characters.description: Quosmiris the ancient god of freshly laundered trousers, overused punctuation and possibly other random and ridiculous things. He appears as a villain inDave the Barbarian. He resembles a muscular green humanoid with a beard and a snakelike tail. His mother also appears inShrink Rap.

characters.name: Roxie
characters.description: Roxie is a female dragon who appeared in the episode Here There Be Dragons. She first met Faffy after seeing him in the cave. Faffy was on his way to get the Star of Night. When Faffy Turned around, he was surrounded by Chino, Jett, And Roxie! She mocked Faffy for being a dragon after smelling him. Roxie Taught Faffy how to look scary and menacing. After the training, Roxie had an idea: To Torment the Humans Including Dave and Fang. After Faffy found out the dragons are bullying his humans, Faffy had used the essence of Roar to get their attention and have finally had enough of the dragons tormenting the humans and decides to teach them a lesson! Roxie voiced byTress MacNeille.

characters.name: Roxie
characters.description: Roxie is a female dragon who appeared in the episode Here There Be Dragons. She first met Faffy after seeing him in the cave. Faffy was on his way to get the Star of Night. Roxie voiced byTress MacNeille.

characters.name: Zit
characters.description: TheZit, whose real name isSebacious D. Wisehop, is a zit that used to be on PrincessCandy's forehead. He is voiced by Nestor Carbonell.  Zit used to be a regular pimple who was removed by Oswidge of a magic spell that he claims he does not use anymore. After the spell is used, Zit becomes sentient and is turned into a giant monster. He smashed the walls of Udrogoth, grabs Candy and took her to his cave. He told Candy that he wanted to go to the Barbarian Ball with her. After that, Candy falls in love with him. They get interrupted by Dave, Fang, Oswidge and Faffy who came to rescue her. Dave brought the zit cream called New and Improved Zit-B-Gon. Candy tried to save him when Dave blasted the cream towards him, but she is too late. Zit is defeated and disappears when he is sprayed with the cream.

characters.name: Strom the Slayer
characters.description: Strom the Slayeris a dragon slayer fromDave the Barbarian.He is voiced by Phil LaMarr. Strom is a muscular man with a beard and a pointy nose who dresses in mostly blue attire. He isFang's greatest idol. He arrives in Udrogoth to slay a dragon - however, this meansFaffy. Upon realizing this, Fang and her siblings must keep Faffy safe. While presented as an antagonist, Strom seems oblivious to the fact that Faffy is domesticated and is used to slaying feral dragons.

characters.name: Strom the Slayer
characters.description: Strom the Slayeris a dragon slayer fromDave the Barbarian.He is voiced by Phil LaMarr. Strom is a muscular man with a beard and a pointy nose who dresses in mostly blue attire. He isFang's greatest idol. He arrives in Udrogoth to slay a dragon - however, this meansFaffy. Upon realizing this, Fang and her siblings must keep Faffy safe. While presented as an antagonist, Strom seems oblivious to the fact that Faffy is domesticated and is used to slaying feral dragons.

characters.name: The Dark Lord Chuckles the Silly Piggy
characters.description: The Dark Lord Chuckles the Silly Piggyis an anthropomorphic pig and the main antagonist from the seriesDave the Barbarian. He is almost always referred to by his full name, never asChuckles. He is voiced by Paul Rugg. Knuckles the Silly Piggy (nephew)

characters.name: The Dark Lord Chuckles the Silly Piggy
characters.description: The Dark Lord Chuckles the Silly Piggyis an anthropomorphic pig and the main antagonist from the seriesDave the Barbarian. He is almost always referred to by his full name, never asChuckles. He is voiced by Paul Rugg. Knuckles the Silly Piggy (nephew)

characters.name: The Narrator
characters.description: The Narrator, also known as The Storyteller, tells the events ofthe series. He never appears physically in any episode. He is voiced by Stephen Tobolowsky. Sometimes, characters in the series are offended by his descriptions of them. He is mostly well-meaning and tells the story from the heroes' perspectives, except when he is enslaved byThe Dark Lord Chuckles the Silly PiggyinA Pig's Story. InThe Maddening Sprite of The Stump, he describes the fight between Dave and theGiant Muffin, but says that a show likeDave the Barbariandid not have the budget to animate the scene.

characters.name: Throktar
characters.description: King Throktaris one half of the rulers of Udrogoth. He is the husband ofQueen Glimiaand he is the father ofDave,CandyandFang. He is away during the events of the series fighting evil all around the world, although he can communicate with his children via Uncle Oswidge's crystal ball, which seems to operate like a telephone. He gets called occasionally while he is in a terrible situation. He is voiced byKevin Michael Richardson. He and his wife rarely ever appear in the series, but they are shown to be heroic and care greatly for their children.

characters.name: Throktar
characters.description: King Throktaris one half of the rulers of Udrogoth. He is the husband ofQueen Glimiaand he is the father ofDave,CandyandFang. He is away during the events of the series fighting evil all around the world, although he can communicate with his children via Uncle Oswidge's crystal ball, which seems to operate like a telephone. He gets called occasionally while he is in a terrible situation. He is voiced byKevin Michael Richardson. He and his wife rarely ever appear in the series, but they are shown to be heroic and care greatly for their children.

characters.name: Twinkle the Marvel Horse
characters.description: Twinkle the Marvel Horseis a magical talking horse, who is the royal steed and pet ofPrincess Candy. It is implied she has had him for a long time. He is voiced by Jeff Bennett.  Twinkle first appears in the episodeNed Frischman: Man of Tomorrow. He has a light blue coat, a purple and yellow tail, and purple hooves. Despite his name, Twinkle is often depressed and has bad dreams and premonitions about "dark forces". Unfortunately, no one seems to listen or care. His depression usually comes from being left alone in the stable for too long. He often shows great paranoia and believes nobody else likes him. Despite this, he is shown to go with the flow in some episodes and play along with the other characters, such as when he showed interest whenNed Frischmanintroduces the GameGuys to Udrogoth. Though he can be irritable, there are few characters in the series he doesn't tolerate.

characters.name: Twinkle the Marvel Horse

Despite this, he is shown to go with the flow in some episodes and play along with the other characters, such as when he showed interest whenNed Frischmanintroduces the GameGuys to Udrogoth. Though he can be irritable, there are few characters in the series he doesn't tolerate.

characters.name: Zit
characters.description: TheZit, whose real name isSebacious D. Wisehop, is a zit that used to be on PrincessCandy's forehead. He is voiced by Nestor Carbonell.  Zit used to be a regular pimple who was removed by Oswidge of a magic spell that he claims he does not use anymore. After the spell is used, Zit becomes sentient and is turned into a giant monster. He smashed the walls of Udrogoth, grabs Candy and took her to his cave. He told Candy that he wanted to go to the Barbarian Ball with her. After that, Candy falls in love with him. They get interrupted by Dave, Fang, Oswidge and Faffy who came to rescue her. Dave brought the zit cream called New and Improved Zit-B-Gon. Candy tried to save him when Dave blasted the cream towards him, but she is too late. Zit is defeated and disappears when he is sprayed with the cream.
